message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate pathlib.zig comptime helpers to withInlineBlock

Migrated pathlib method generators to callback pattern:
- methodBlock - wraps obj in labeled block with body
- boolCheck - condition check with fallback on error
- methodWithArg - method with single argument
- voidOp - void method with error handling

Reduces emitInlineBlockStart occurrences from 48 to 44.
